CustomField.description: When enabled, NPPatch stores error records in the Error__c custom object for review and troubleshooting. Errors include batch job failures, trigger exceptions, and validation errors. Enabled by default. Disabling prevents error logging but errors still appear in Apex debug logs.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Store NPPatch errors in the Error object for review. Enabled by default. Disable to stop creating error records.
CustomField.label: Store Errors
